features.name: Hold Breath
features.description: The hippopotamus can hold its breath for 10 minutes.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The hippopotamus makes two Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Bruiser - Amphibious tank with devastating bite attacks
tactical_info.positioning: Controls water access points, charges from water
tactical_info.key_abilities: High HP, massive damage, amphibious nature
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low DEX makes it vulnerable to ranged attacks
tactical_info.synergies: Dominates aquatic chokepoints and river crossings
